query:
SELECT id, name, idPrefix FROM animal_categories ORDER BY id LIMIT 20;
SELECT DISTINCT categoryId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM animals WHERE deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY categoryId ORDER BY categoryId;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Miqjapjuirru1Z.b9867fc13f8f --database boyWMBM5odtbpptCLrtK7n --execute SELECT id, name, idPrefix FROM animal_categories ORDER BY id LIMIT 20;
SELECT DISTINCT categoryId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM animals WHERE deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY categoryId ORDER BY categoryId;
